idea.raw_input: Create a screen for the add button in the navigation. Reference design file: add_transaction.html from Google Drive. The screen should be a full-screen Add Transaction page with expense/income toggle, amount display with custom keypad, category selection chips (Groceries, Fun, Health, Rent, Transport, Subs), and an Add Transaction action button. Replace the current bottom-sheet approach with a proper full-screen page.

overview.problem: The current Add Transaction flow uses a basic modal bottom sheet with text fields, which provides a poor user experience compared to the intended design.
overview.solution: Replace the bottom sheet with a dedicated full-screen Add Transaction screen featuring a custom keypad, category chips, and expense/income toggle matching the reference design.
overview.target_user: Fortuna budget app users who need to quickly add income or expense transactions.
overview.success_metric: Users can add a transaction in under 30 seconds using the new screen with category selection and custom keypad.

screens.name: Add Transaction
screens.purpose: Full-screen page where users enter transaction amount via custom keypad, select type (expense/income), pick a category, and submit.
primary_actions: Select category from horizontal chip list

features.name: Add Transaction Screen
features.description: A full-screen page for adding transactions with expense/income toggle, custom numeric keypad, category selection chips, and submit button. Replaces the existing bottom sheet approach.
acceptance_criteria: Given the user taps the Add tab in bottom nav, when the Add Transaction screen appears, then it shows expense/income toggle, amount display, category chips, and keypad.
Given the user enters an amount via the keypad, when they tap a digit, then the amount display updates in real time.
Given the user selects a category chip, when tapped, then the chip highlights with secondary container color and primary border.
Given the user taps the Add Transaction button with valid amount > 0, when submitted, then the transaction is saved via BudgetModel.addTransaction() and the screen closes.
Given the user taps close button, when tapped, then the screen closes without saving.

features.name: Custom Keypad
features.description: A 12-button numeric keypad (0-9, decimal, backspace) that updates the amount display. Starts at 0, supports decimal input, handles backspace.
acceptance_criteria: Given the amount is 0, when user taps a non-zero digit, then the display replaces 0 with that digit.
Given the amount already has a decimal point, when user taps decimal again, then the input is ignored.
Given the amount has digits, when user taps backspace, then the last digit is removed.
Given the amount is a single digit, when user taps backspace, then the display resets to 0.

features.name: Category Selection
features.description: Horizontal scrollable row of category chips: Groceries, Fun, Health, Rent, Transport, Subs. Each chip shows an icon and label. One category can be selected at a time.
acceptance_criteria: Given the screen loads, when displayed, then 6 category chips are visible with icons and labels.
Given no category is selected, when user taps a category chip, then that chip highlights and others reset.
Given a category is already selected, when user taps a different chip, then the new chip highlights and the old one resets.

state_management.justification: Existing app already uses Provider with BudgetModel ChangeNotifier. No new state management needed.

navigation.pattern: ShellRoute with existing tab navigation, new GoRoute for /add-transaction
navigation.justification: Existing app uses go_router with ShellRoute for tab navigation.

local_storage.justification: Existing app already uses shared_preferences via BudgetModel.

di.justification: Existing app uses Provider for DI.

observability.justification: size_hint is small, existing app has no remote observability.

items.title: Update app_router.dart for Add Transaction route
items.description: Update lib/router/app_router.dart to add /add-transaction GoRoute and update Add tab navigation

changes: Updated Add tab to navigate to /add-transaction

gate_1.notes: flutter analyze: 0 errors in new file. All imports resolve.

prd_checks.check: No hardcoded colors or font sizes

gate_1.notes: flutter analyze: 0 errors. Route resolves correctly.

Bottom nav still works for Home and History tabs
